zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Valletort於大約1225年出生在英國哈普爾維古姆時，她的父親Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.39歲，母親Jane Basset34歲。她和Richard of Cornwall至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1276年3月18日在英國戴文金斯布利其享年52歲，埋葬在英國戴文金斯布利其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Valletort was born about 1225, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, her father, Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p., was 39 and her mother, Jane Basset, was 34. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Richard of Cornwall. She died on 18 March 1276, in Kingsbridge, Devon, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Kingsbridge, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Valletort est née environ 1225, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p., avait 39 ans et sa mère, Jane Basset, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Richard of Cornwall. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1276, à Kingsbridge, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Kingsbridge, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Valletort um 1225 in Winchester, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. 39 und ihre Mutter Jane Basset 34. Sie hatte mit Richard of Cornwall mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. März 1276 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Kingsbridge, Devon, England und wurde in Kingsbridge, Devon, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Valletortが約1225年にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.は39歳，母Jane Bassetは34歳であった。彼女はRichard of Cornwallとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1276年3月18日にイギリスデボンキングスブリッジで52歳で死去し，イギリスデボンキングスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Valletort(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p.(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Basset(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Richard of Cornwall(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 3월 18일 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 킨그스브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Valletort nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p., tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Jane Basset, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Richard of Cornwall. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1276, em Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Kingsbridge, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Valletort родилась около 1225 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald II de Vautort Baron of Trematon Castle, d.s.p. было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Basset, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Richard of Cornwall. Она умерла 18 марта 1276 г. в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности кингсбридж, девон, Англия.
